metadata.name: Share a Report with a Client

description: An analyst has finalized a monthly report and needs to share it with the client.

nodes.task_description: Generate a shareable link for the report from the reporting tool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a link to the dashboard or report.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the sharing settings are set to 'view only' to prevent the client from making edits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly configures the permissions for the link.

nodes.task_description: Draft an email to the client, including the link to the report and a brief summary of the results.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes and sends a clear, professional email to the client.
